title: Gentler Weather Sounds
description: Weather sounds you won't mind listening to // Complete replacement for rain & thunder!
body:
![A scene in Minecraft with a cat sitting on a bed and rain out the window. At the top it says Gentler Weather Sounds in a warm orange](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdd19c0824419a3684ae022c4046cff6f0321516.jpeg)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I've never been satisfied with Minecraft's weather sounds, finding them either harsh, out of place, or just not all that enjoyable to listen to, so I made Gentler Weather Sounds! Gentler Weather Sounds replaces Minecraft's weather sounds with something that's more pleasant to listen to. It offers full replacement of rain and thunder/ lightning audio!

Recommend using with Extended Weather Radius!

For just the rain sounds or just the lightning & thunder sounds, use Gentler Rain Sounds or Better Lightning Sounds, respectively!

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Preview was recorded using Version 2.2.0
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- **Can I use this in a modpack or on my server?** Yes, please save as many people as you can from the horrid Vanilla rain sounds - **Would you support modded weather?** I'm open to it, but it would have to have a default sound that I find annoying or out of place in Minecraft. At this time I'm not doing replacement for the sake of replacement. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Sounds Used Any uncredited sounds are designed/ recorded by me All sounds have been edited to work together better [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/rain-and-thunder-nature-sounds-7803/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/rain-and-thunder-nature-sounds-7803/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/soft-rain-ambient-111154/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/soft-rain-ambient-111154/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/natural-thunder-113219/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/natural-thunder-113219/) [https://freesound.org/people/bone666138/sounds/198857/](https://freesound.org/people/bone666138/sounds/198857/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/thunder-24571/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/thunder-24571/) [https://freesound.org/people/shelbyshark/sounds/513394/](https://freesound.org/people/shelbyshark/sounds/513394/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/copyright-free-rain-sounds-331497/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/copyright-free-rain-sounds-331497/) [https://freesound.org/people/Soundrack/sounds/733288/](https://freesound.org/people/Soundrack/sounds/733288/) [https://freesound.org/people/Spennnyyy/sounds/350506/](https://freesound.org/people/Spennnyyy/sounds/350506/) [https://freesound.org/people/jrosin/sounds/329978/](https://freesound.org/people/jrosin/sounds/329978/) [https://freesound.org/people/dobroide/sounds/41365/](https://freesound.org/people/dobroide/sounds/41365/) [https://freesound.org/people/fattirewhitey/sounds/523905/](https://freesound.org/people/fattirewhitey/sounds/523905/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/calm-rain-ambience-421001/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/calm-rain-ambience-421001/) [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/nature-winter-rain-in-oak-forest-loop-185672/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/nature-winter-rain-in-oak-forest-loop-185672/)
